library.signInTitle: Sign in to see your list
library.signInDesc: Create an account to start tracking what you watch.
library.collectionsSignInDesc: Create an account to make custom collections and share them.

search.emptyDesc: Find your next favorite title. Try searching for a genre, actor, or director.

collections.signInToComment: Sign in to leave a comment
collections.signInToWrite: Sign in to write a review

profile.reviewsEmpty: Reviews you write will appear here.

onboarding.step1Desc: Search and select titles you've already seen. This helps us learn your taste.
onboarding.step2Desc: Your ratings help us find better recommendations.
onboarding.step3Desc: Start discovering new movies, TV shows, and anime tailored to you.

about.title: About Seriez
about.description: Seriez is a tracking platform for movies, TV shows, and anime. Log what you watch, rate it, write reviews, and build your personal library — and we'll learn your taste to recommend what to watch next.
about.trackLibrary: Track movies, TV shows, and anime in a unified library
about.rateReview: Rate and review everything you watch
about.createCollections: Create custom collections to organize your library
about.boxOffice: Explore box office charts across 9 countries
about.discover: Discover new titles with Roulette and mood-based search
about.smartRoulette: Track what you watch and we'll learn your taste — smarter For You recommendations the more you track.
about.community: Connect with other viewers through shared reviews and comments
about.goldenTicketDesc: Unlock premium features with a Golden Ticket for $4.99/month. Golden Ticket members get unlimited collections, yearly recaps, and more.

meta.title: Seriez — Track Movies, TV Shows & Anime
meta.description: Track movies, TV shows, and anime. Rate, review, and discover your next watch — in 7 languages.

pro.title: ✨ Golden Ticket
pro.subtitle: Unlock the full Seriez experience.
features: Unlimited custom collections — organize your library your way
Publish Collections — share your curated lists with the community
Right Now — a curated recommendation delivered daily
Roulette Discovery — spin to find your next watch
Yearly Recap — your watching year in review
Viewer DNA — your watching personality decoded from your ratings
Advanced Stats — genre breakdowns, top actors, and watching patterns
Golden Ticket badge on your profile
pro.paddleNotice: Golden Ticket purchases are processed securely through Paddle.

items.account: Account data: username, email address, and profile information you provide.
items.usage: Usage data: your watch history, ratings, reviews, collections, and interactions on the platform.
items.technical: Technical data: IP address, browser type, and device information collected automatically for security and performance purposes.

items.provide: To provide and maintain the Seriez platform.
items.display: To display your public profile, reviews, and activity.
items.improve: To improve the service and fix issues.

sharing.title: 3. Data Sharing
sharing.intro: We do not sell your personal data to third parties. We share data only:
sharing.paddle: With Paddle for payment processing — Paddle receives your email and payment details under their privacy policy.
sharing.legal: When required by law or to protect our rights.

storage.title: 4. Data Storage and Security
storage.content: Your data is stored on secure servers with industry-standard encryption. We take reasonable measures to protect your information, but no method of electronic storage is 100% secure.

items.access: Access the personal data we hold about you.
items.correct: Request correction or deletion of your data.

cookies.title: 6. Cookies
cookies.content: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. We do not use tracking or advertising cookies. No cookie consent banner is required as we only use strictly necessary cookies.

changes.title: 7. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this policy from time to time. Material changes will be communicated via email or a notice on the platform.

contact.title: 8. Contact
contact.content: For privacy-related inquiries, contact us at support@seriez.app.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By using Seriez, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the service.

accounts.title: 2. User Accounts
accounts.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activity under your account.

content.title: 3. User Content
content.content: You retain ownership of the reviews, ratings, comments, and other content you post. By posting, you grant Seriez a non-exclusive, royalty-free license to display and distribute your content on the platform. You are solely responsible for the content you post and warrant that it does not violate any laws or third-party rights.

use.title: 4. Acceptable Use
use.content: You agree not to post content that is unlawful, harassing, defamatory, abusive, threatening, obscene, or otherwise objectionable. Seriez reserves the right to remove any content and suspend or terminate accounts at its sole discretion.

goldenTicket.title: 5. Golden Ticket Subscriptions
goldenTicket.content: Golden Ticket is a recurring subscription at $4.99/month or $49/year. Payments are processed through Paddle. You may cancel at any time; cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period. No refunds for partial months.

thirdParty.title: 6. Third-Party Content
thirdParty.content: Seriez displays movie, TV, and anime metadata from TMDB and AniList. Seriez is not affiliated with or endorsed by these services. All movie and TV show images and data are provided by TMDB under their terms.

liability.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Seriez is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. Seriez shall not be liable for any damages arising from the use or inability to use the service.

changes.title: 8. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

contact.title: 9. Contact
contact.content: For questions about these terms, contact us at support@seriez.app.

admin.moderationDesc: Review flagged content and take action
admin.auditLogDesc: Track all admin actions and moderation history
admin.userManagementDesc: View, search, and manage user accounts, roles, and permissions
admin.contentModerationDesc: Review reported content, hide or delete items
admin.auditDesc: Track all admin actions and moderation history
admin.deleteUserConfirm: Permanently delete @{username} and all their data. Type the username to confirm.
